FAILUsers can be listedConnectAs a Posit Team administratorsrc/vip_tests/connect/test_users.py::test_list_users0.42sTest procedureGiven Connect is accessible at the configured URLWhen I list all usersThen the user list is not emptyAnd the test user exists in the user listError tracebackCopyfixturefunc = <function check_test_user_in_list at 0x7fb3ec476e50>
request = <FixtureRequest for <Function test_list_users>>
kwargs = {'test_username': 'testuser', 'user_list': [{'active_time': '2026-06-11T18:16:31Z', 'confirmed': True, 'created_time': '2026-06-11T18:14:48Z', 'email': '', ...}]}

    def call_fixture_func(
        fixturefunc: _FixtureFunc[FixtureValue], request: FixtureRequest, kwargs
    ) -> FixtureValue:
        if inspect.isgeneratorfunction(fixturefunc):
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., Generator[FixtureValue]], fixturefunc)
            generator = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
            try:
                fixture_result = next(generator)
            except StopIteration:
                raise ValueError(f"{request.fixturename} did not yield a value") from None
            finalizer = functools.partial(_teardown_yield_fixture, fixturefunc, generator)
            request.addfinalizer(finalizer)
        else:
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., FixtureValue], fixturefunc)
>           fixture_result = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
                             ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^

.venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/_pytest/fixtures.py:915: 
_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ 

user_list = [{'active_time': '2026-06-11T18:16:31Z', 'confirmed': True, 'created_time': '2026-06-11T18:14:48Z', 'email': '', ...}]
test_username = 'testuser'

    @then("the test user exists in the user list")
    def check_test_user_in_list(user_list, test_username):
        expected = test_username.split("@", 1)[0]
        usernames = [u.get("username") for u in user_list]
>       assert expected in usernames, (
            f"Test user {expected!r} (from {test_username!r}) not found in user list: {usernames}"
        )
E       AssertionError: Test user 'testuser' (from 'testuser') not found in user list: ['__bootstrap_admin__']
E       assert 'testuser' in ['__bootstrap_admin__']

src/vip_tests/connect/test_users.py:54: AssertionError

2026/06/11 18:18:03.352921603 function (file = if (onefile) "Rplots.pdf" else "Rplot%03d.pdf",
2026/06/11 18:18:03.352929325 width, height, onefile, family, title, fonts, version, paper,
2026/06/11 18:18:03.352962645 encoding, bg, fg, pointsize, pagecentre, colormodel, useDingbats,
2026/06/11 18:18:03.352963556 useKerning, fillOddEven, compress, timestamp, producer, author)
2026/06/11 18:18:03.352982885 {
2026/06/11 18:18:03.352983466 initPSandPDFfonts()
2026/06/11 18:18:03.352992590 new <- list()
2026/06/11 18:18:03.352993021 if (!missing(width))
2026/06/11 18:18:03.353002355 new$width <- width
2026/06/11 18:18:03.353002785 if (!missing(height))
2026/06/11 18:18:03.353017978 new$height <- height
2026/06/11 18:18:03.353018649 if (!missing(onefile))
2026/06/11 18:18:03.353033792 new$onefile <- onefile
2026/06/11 18:18:03.353034463 if (!missing(title))
2026/06/11 18:18:03.353048444 new$title <- title
2026/06/11 18:18:03.353049225 if (!missing(fonts))
2026/06/11 18:18:03.353064979 new$fonts <- fonts
2026/06/11 18:18:03.353065409 if (!missing(version))
2026/06/11 18:18:03.353074543 new$version <- version
2026/06/11 18:18:03.353074984 if (!missing(paper))
2026/06/11 18:18:03.353083727 new$paper <- paper
2026/06/11 18:18:03.353084197 if (!missing(encoding))
2026/06/11 18:18:03.353092890 new$encoding <- encoding
2026/06/11 18:18:03.353093311 if (!missing(bg))
2026/06/11 18:18:03.353107683 new$bg <- bg
2026/06/11 18:18:03.353108644 if (!missing(fg))
2026/06/11 18:18:03.353121168 new$fg <- fg
2026/06/11 18:18:03.353122199 if (!missing(pointsize))
2026/06/11 18:18:03.353136681 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/06/11 18:18:03.353137672 if (!missing(pagecentre))
2026/06/11 18:18:03.353152635 new$pagecentre <- pagecentre
2026/06/11 18:18:03.353153246 if (!missing(colormodel))
2026/06/11 18:18:03.353163301 new$colormodel <- colormodel
2026/06/11 18:18:03.353163711 if (!missing(useDingbats))
2026/06/11 18:18:03.353173847 new$useDingbats <- useDingbats
2026/06/11 18:18:03.353174277 if (!missing(useKerning))
2026/06/11 18:18:03.353216115 new$useKerning <- useKerning
2026/06/11 18:18:03.353218419 if (!missing(fillOddEven))
2026/06/11 18:18:03.353233512 new$fillOddEven <- fillOddEven
2026/06/11 18:18:03.353233952 if (!missing(compress))
2026/06/11 18:18:03.353249170 new$compress <- compress
2026/06/11 18:18:03.353259050 if (!missing(timestamp))
2026/06/11 18:18:03.353259781 new$timestamp <- timestamp
2026/06/11 18:18:03.353274543 if (!missing(producer))
2026/06/11 18:18:03.353275194 new$producer <- producer
2026/06/11 18:18:03.353289916 if (!missing(author))
2026/06/11 18:18:03.353290627 new$author <- author
2026/06/11 18:18:03.353304418 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)
2026/06/11 18:18:03.353305159 if (!missing(family) && (inherits(family, "Type1Font") ||
2026/06/11 18:18:03.353325560 inherits(family, "CIDFont"))) {
2026/06/11 18:18:03.353326381 enc <- family$encoding
2026/06/11 18:18:03.353341193 if (inherits(family, "Type1Font") && !is.null(enc) &&
2026/06/11 18:18:03.353341924 enc != "default" && (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding ==
2026/06/11 18:18:03.353362736 "default"))
2026/06/11 18:18:03.353363517 old$encoding <- enc
2026/06/11 18:18:03.353378059 family <- family$metrics
2026/06/11 18:18:03.353378730 }
2026/06/11 18:18:03.353388238 if (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding == "default")
2026/06/11 18:18:03.353400162 old$encoding <- guessEncoding()
2026/06/11 18:18:03.353400943 if (!missing(family)) {
2026/06/11 18:18:03.353414303 if (length(family) == 4L) {
2026/06/11 18:18:03.353414824 family <- c(family, "Symbol.afm")
2026/06/11 18:18:03.353425099 }
2026/06/11 18:18:03.353425570 else if (length(family) == 5L) {
2026/06/11 18:18:03.353438419 }
2026/06/11 18:18:03.353439100 else if (length(family) == 1L) {
2026/06/11 18:18:03.353452741 pf <- pdfFonts(family)[[1L]]
2026/06/11 18:18:03.353453512 if (is.null(pf))
2026/06/11 18:18:03.353468324 stop(gettextf("unknown family '%s'", family),
2026/06/11 18:18:03.353469055 domain = NA)
2026/06/11 18:18:03.353484368 matchFont(pf, old$encoding)
2026/06/11 18:18:03.353485119 }
2026/06/11 18:18:03.353498259 else stop("invalid 'family' argument")
2026/06/11 18:18:03.353498690 old$family <- family
2026/06/11 18:18:03.353508825 }
2026/06/11 18:18:03.353509316 version <- old$version
2026/06/11 18:18:03.353517939 versions <- c("1.1", "1.2", "1.3", "1.4", "1.5", "1.6", "1.7",
2026/06/11 18:18:03.353518389 "2.0")
2026/06/11 18:18:03.353532460 if (version %in% versions)
2026/06/11 18:18:03.353533171 version <- as.integer(strsplit(version, "[.]")[[1L]])
2026/06/11 18:18:03.353561869 else stop("invalid PDF version")
2026/06/11 18:18:03.353577077 onefile <- old$onefile
2026/06/11 18:18:03.353577859 if (!checkIntFormat(file))
2026/06/11 18:18:03.353592120 stop(gettextf("invalid 'file' argument '%s'", file),
2026/06/11 18:18:03.353592941 domain = NA)
2026/06/11 18:18:03.353606191 .External(C_PDF, file, old$paper, old$family, old$encoding,
2026/06/11 18:18:03.353606642 old$bg, old$fg, old$width, old$height, old$pointsize,
2026/06/11 18:18:03.353618900 onefile, old$pagecentre, old$title, old$fonts, version[1L],
2026/06/11 18:18:03.353619431 version[2L], old$colormodel, old$useDingbats, old$useKerning,
2026/06/11 18:18:03.353639171 old$fillOddEven, old$compress, old$timestamp, old$producer,
2026/06/11 18:18:03.353639902 old$author)
2026/06/11 18:18:03.353657198 invisible()
2026/06/11 18:18:03.353657949 }
